title: Hurricane and Flooding Readiness
immediate_steps: Board up windows or close storm shutters
Bring outdoor furniture and garbage cans inside
Turn off propane tanks and unplug small appliances
Evacuate immediately if ordered to do so, following designated routes
If trapped by flooding, move to the highest level of the building, but do not climb into a closed attic (you may become trapped)
avoid: Do not walk, swim, or drive through floodwaters ('Turn Around, Don't Drown')
Do not drink tap water until authorities declare it safe
Do not return home until the area is declared safe
